This '''unidentified [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]''' lived on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. [[Calder Nettic]] was rumored to have had business ties with this Hutt prior to his death in [[3956 BBY]].

His fate during the Sith raid is unknown.

==Behind the scenes==
The existence of this particular Hutt is only hinted at within the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' through a remark made to the player character by [[Handon Guld]]. This mention may have been intended as a reference to the character of [[Shuma (Hutt)|Shuma]] before Shuma was cut from the final product.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
